bead.title: website: create /why/ long-form section (reality → pain → physics → operating model)
bead.description: Create website/content/why/_index.md with full narrative arc: (1) New Reality, (2) Six Pain Points, (3) Root Cause — agents execute in isolation with no shared memory; DDx answers with four primitives: artifacts, beads, tracked execution (ddx work), skills, (4) Physics 6-principle exposition, (5) DDx as the response. HELIX boundary: no HELIX methodology concepts (no vision→PRD→spec→code hierarchy). This page is a prerequisite for nav and redirect changes.
bead.acceptance: website/content/why/_index.md exists; narrative arc covers all five beats; four primitives named using DDx-only language; ddx work is the only execution command named (not ddx try/run); no HELIX methodology concepts; page renders correctly in Hugo
